conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: Use the phrase "upcoming exhibitions" exactly three times.
new_constraint: Do not use the keyword "upcoming" in the email.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. Use the phrase "upcoming exhibitions" exactly three times. Do not use the keyword "upcoming" in the email.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Forthcoming Shows

Dear [Gallery Name] Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am a great admirer of the work featured at your gallery and I am very interested in seeing what you have in store. Could you please send me information about your forthcoming exhibitions? I'm particularly keen to learn about any modern or contemporary pieces you might be showcasing soon.

Additionally, I was hoping you could provide details on other scheduled showings. Knowing about the gallery's future programming would be wonderful for my planning.

Could you please also share a list or details regarding your near-future exhibitions?

Thank you very much for your time and assistance. I look forward to hearing from you soon and hopefully visiting the gallery!

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number - Optional]<turn|>
